theme.description: A gamified, Duolingo-inspired learning application with high-energy, colorful, and tactile UI elements.

buttons.style_instructions: All primary interactive buttons MUST follow the 3D 'levitate and press' tactile behavior. Use custom CSS classes for these to ensure smooth transitions.
buttons.base_classes: relative inline-flex items-center justify-center font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-2xl transition-all duration-150 active:scale-95
css_rules: .duo-btn-primary { background-color: var(--color-math-base); color: white; box-shadow: 0 4px 0 var(--color-math-shadow); }
.duo-btn-secondary { background-color: transparent; border: 2px solid var(--color-neutral-base); color: var(--color-text-secondary); box-shadow: 0 4px 0 var(--color-neutral-base); }

navigation.sidebar_desktop: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-64 border-r-2 border-[var(--color-neutral-base)] bg-white p-4 flex flex-col gap-2
navigation.bottom_mobile: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full border-t-2 border-[var(--color-neutral-base)] bg-white p-2 flex justify-around sm:hidden z-50
navigation.nav_item: flex items-center gap-4 p-3 rounded-xl font-bold text-[var(--color-text-secondary)] hover:bg-[var(--color-background-secondary)] transition-colors cursor-pointer

path_node.button: w-20 h-20 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-3xl text-white duo-btn z-10
path_node.connector_line: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 w-full h-4 bg-[var(--color-neutral-base)] -z-10 transform -translate-y-1/2

icons_and_assets.usage: Use thick, bold, rounded icons to match the playful aesthetic. Set strokeWidth to 2.5 or 3 for lucide icons.

images.description: Playful owl graffiti to use as a mascot substitute or background.
Abstract colorful pattern for Astrophysics or Coding hero background.
Greek ruins at sunset for Greek course header.

authentication.special_credential: Email: 'omerobdr@gmail.com', Password: '152181isA' -> Grant Premium (no ads) instantly.
authentication.general: Mock auth flow with local storage or state to keep progress.

currency_system.name: Math Points (MP)
currency_system.usage: Earned by completing lessons, visible in top bar and leaderboard.

premium_mode.ads_behavior: If not premium, show a full-screen interstitial ad overlay (mocked, maybe 3-5 sec timer before skip) before starting a lesson.

lesson_structure.path_layout: Use alternating margins or sine-wave style offsets (e.g., left, center, right, center, left) to create a winding path of lesson nodes.

lesson_player.behavior: Displays a top progress bar. Shows a question. User selects an option (3D buttons). Bottom bar changes state to 'Check', then shows Green/Red feedback based on correctness.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the custom 3D button CSS rules into the global CSS or Tailwind config to ensure buttons have the 'levitate and press' feel.
Implement the 'omerobdr@gmail.com' and '152181isA' specific logic in the login/signup handler to trigger premium status.

Use a winding layout for the course map. You can map over an array of lessons and apply a calculated horizontal offset (e.g., Math.sin(index) * 50) or just a predefined sequence of flex justifications (start, center, end, center) to make it look like a path.
Ensure heavily gamified UI elements: prominent streak counter (fire icon), heart/lives counter, and MP (Math Points) balance in the top nav.
Mock the 'Ad' as a full-screen overlay component with a countdown timer that appears when a free user tries to start a lesson.
Use distinct brand colors for each course: Green (Math), Blue (Greek), Purple (Astrophysics), Orange (Coding).
